#+TITLE: Emacs & Org Mode
#+FILETAGS: :emacs:tools:

* Org Mode
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 20240115-org-mode
:END:

Org mode is a powerful system for organizing notes and tasks.

** Key Features
- *Plain text* format
- /Hierarchical/ structure
- TODO tracking
- +deprecated features+
- ~code snippets~

** Org Roam
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 20240115-org-roam
:END:

Org-roam is a knowledge management system built on org-mode.
It uses [[id:20240115-index][the index]] as an entry point.

Links to [[id:20240115-rust][Rust]] and [[id:20240115-projects][Projects]].

* Emacs Lisp
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 20240115-elisp
:END:

#+BEGIN_SRC emacs-lisp
(defun hello ()
  (message "Hello, World!"))
#+END_SRC
